book.title: The $10K Month System
book.subtitle: A 90-day plan to your first consistent five-figure month as a solo operator.
book.description: A 90-day operating plan to reach and sustain a $10,000/month run rate. Week-by-week actions, the exact offers, and the math that makes it work.
whatYouLearn: Offers priced to hit the number
The retention loop that locks it in

faq.a: For an established skill, yes. For a brand-new skill, expect 6 months using the same system.

sections.heading: A note before you begin
body: This is a preview of the opening of the book. The full version includes every chapter, every framework, and every template referenced inside.
Grab a notebook. The frameworks inside are meant to be used, not just read.
